info.name: AxiomNizam - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete collection of ALL AxiomNizam API endpoints covering 200+ routes across 17 categories: Health, Auth, CRUD (7 databases), Dynamic Queries (5 databases), Query Logging, Data Transformation, Admin, Notifications, CLI Auth, K8s Resources, DataSources, Jobs, GIS, Analytics, CDC/ETL, API Builder, and Network Intelligence.
